name: Sentelic Corporation
summary: Sentelic Corporation operates as an IC design company in Taiwan, China, and Japan. The company offers mixed-signal, ASIC, firmware/software, and multi-media processing services; fan motor drive control IC's for servers, communication equipment, cloud data centers, and 5G base stations; and cooling fans for servers, telecommunication switching equipment, gaming graphics cards, and mining hardware. Sentelic Corporation was founded in 2000 and is based in Taipei, Taiwan.
